     version: 7.0.0.0


Usage:
  VCD-Generator [options]

Options:
  --no-logo                                                    Suppress the logo [default: False]
  -rf, --requirements-file <requirements-file> (REQUIRED)      The spreadsheet file that contains the requirements that need to be verified [default: requirements.xlsx]
  -sn, --requirements-sheet-name <requirements-sheet-name>     The name of the requirements sheet in the spreadsheet file that is to be processed. If left empty then the first sheet in the workbook will be used.
  -id, --requirements-id-column <requirements-id-column>       The name of the table-column that contains the identifier of the requirements. If left empty then the first column with content is used.
  -txt, --requirements-text-column <requirements-text-column>  The name of the table-column that contains the text of the requirements. If left empty then the requirement text is ignored.
  -sd, --source-directory <source-directory> (REQUIRED)        The directory that contains the test result files, this directory is process recursively [default: /tmp/inspectra-static-vcdg-927a1d6b-ce4c12b8/tool/.store/vcdg/7.0.0/vcdg/7.0.0/tools/net8.0/any]
  -o, --output-report <output-report> (REQUIRED)               The path to the report file [default: VCD-report.xlsx]
  -?, -h, --help                                               Show help and usage information
  --version                                                    Show version information
